welcome.main_title: Welcome to the Sacred Abode of the Goddess
welcome.main_subtitle: Nestled on a hill adorned with natural beauty, this ancient temple offers devotees a unique experience of faith, peace, and spirituality.
welcome.section_title: Shri Ekavira Devi Temple – Spiritual Heritage
welcome.desc: Located on a hill in Jaitapur (Taluka Baglan, District Nashik), Shri Kulaswamini Ekavira Devi Temple is an ancient sacred site believed to be around 250 to 300 years old. Along with the Ekavira Devi temple, there is also an ancient Shiva temple at this place. Surrounded by serene natural beauty and deep-rooted religious traditions, this site is considered highly sacred by devotees.

features.heritage_desc: A temple with a history of 250 to 300 years, preserving rich traditions and heritage.
features.devotion_desc: Situated on a hill, accessible through stone steps.
features.trust_desc: Sacred place of Ekavira Devi and Shiva, known for its peaceful and spiritual environment.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About the Trust
about.msg_para1: This pride of a virtuous and sattvic state of mind, with the grace and blessings of Shri Ekavira Devi, the acclamations of the devotees, good thoughts, and good actions...
about.msg_para2: On September 22, 1976, the first Board of Trustees of Shri Kulaswamini Ekavira Devi Trust started its magnificent journey. This is a journey of devotees' faith, the eternal presence of Shri Ekavira Mata, and a scenic place of joy.
about.msg_para3: Every year 45 to 50 lakh devotees come from all over the world. A holy confluence of pilgrimage and tourism. Our sincere wish is to provide excellent facilities for the devotees. The Trust believes in increasing facilities while maintaining the holiness and significance of the region.
about.works_desc: Renovation of Shri Ekavira Devi Temple, construction of steps, magnificent entrance, meditation hall for devotees, Bhaktangan, Bhaktaniwas, Prasadalaya Annapurna, charitable dispensary, renovation of Shivalaya Lake, drinking water up to the temple area, concretization of internal roads on the hill, provision of three generators for power supply.
about.staff_desc: Efforts to acquire land for expansion of Bhaktaniwas. Proposal to Yavana, positive action. Various action programs and expansion work for beautification of the temple for spiritual joy, creation of educational institutions, peace, nobility, and holiness of the region.
about.donor_remembrance: The contribution of various generous donors of the Trust is remembered. The names of the donors are a mark of respect and manifestation of their generosity. Government cooperation, decisions, and the support of government agencies are remarkable. The staff is working promptly to keep the daily operations of the Trust smooth.
about.trust_name: Shri Kulaswamini Ekavira Devi Mandir Trust, Jaitapur

names.bhave: Ma. Dr. Shri Prakash A. Bhave

festival.title: Upcoming Events
festival.subtitle: Celebrate culture, traditions, and community gatherings.
festival.page_subtitle: Celebrate the Divine Grace of Goddess Ekavira
festival.tripuri_subtitle: Celebration of lights and devotion since 2017
festival.tripuri_desc: A celebration of lights marking the victory of Lord Shiva over the demon Tripurasura.
festival.tripuri_content:
• Started since 2017
• Celebrated at night on the day of Tripuri Pournima
• Deepotsav (lighting of lamps) is held in the temple premises
• Large numbers of villagers and devotees participate
• Mahaprasad is organized (approx. 500 devotees participate)
festival.kojagiri_desc: Harvest festival celebrated on the full moon day of the Hindu lunar month of Ashvin.
festival.kojagiri_content:
• Every year on Kojagiri Pournima, all-night religious programs / Raas-krida are held
• This program is related to local religious traditions
• All-night vigil (Jagran) and devotion are performed in the presence of the Goddess
• The awakening of Goddess Ekavira is celebrated under the cool moonlight of Ashvin Pournima
• Devotees participate in large numbers to seek the Goddess's grace

about_history.title: Temple History
about_history.intro_quote: Shri Kulaswamini Ekavira Devi Temple is an ancient and sacred temple located on a hill in Jaitapur (Taluka Baglan, District Nashik), holding significant historical, religious, and natural importance.

section1.title: Ancient Context and Background
section1.p1: There are two ancient temples located on the hill adjacent to Jaitapur village – the south-facing Shri Ekavira Devi Temple and the east-facing ancient Shiva Temple. Both these temples are estimated to be around 250 to 300 years old.
section1.p2: In front of this hill is Salher Fort, the second highest peak in Maharashtra. Also nearby in Mulher is the Samadhi of Shri Uddhav Maharaj, which adds to the religious significance of this area.
section1.p3: The natural beauty, peaceful environment, and religious traditions make this area extremely sacred.

section2.title: Establishment and Development
section2.list1: The primary renovation of the Ekavira Devi Temple was carried out in 1991.
section2.list2: Stone steps were constructed as the temple is located on a hill.
section2.list3: In 2011, 2 hectares (5 acres) of land was sanctioned by the government for the temple.
section2.list4: The 'Shri Kulaswamini Ekavira Devi Bhaktagan Mandal' Trust was established.

modern.title: Modern Form
modern.list1: New stone construction of the ancient Shiva Temple in progress (since 2026)
modern.list2: New plan including Sanctum Sanctorum, Darshan Mandap, Sabha Mandap, and Mukhamandap
modern.list3: Efforts to make the temple premises more beautiful and convenient for devotees

renovation.title: Support Needed for Shri Kulaswamini Ekavira Devi Temple Renovation
renovation.desc: The grand renovation of the ancient Shiva Temple and Shri Kulaswamini Ekavira Devi Temple at Jaitapur is being carried out entirely in black stone. Spacious areas for Deepmala, Bhaktaniwas, vehicle parking, and various religious programs will be created within the temple premises.

features.plan_desc: Includes Sanctum, Darshan Hall, Assembly Hall, and Entrance Porch.
features.stay_desc: Accommodation and facilities for devotees coming from afar.
features.support_desc: This sacred task will be completed with your donation and cooperation.

renovation.donor_note: * Names of donors will be displayed in the form of inscriptions in the temple premises.

floating.title: Temple Development Campaign
floating.desc: Grand renovation of the temple is underway under the guidance of Shri. Tidke.
